text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Oka Sho fast approaching, Air Groove
spots Mejiro Dober training with extreme fervor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is frustrated at herself because she
believes she's nowhere near as good as the other
members of the Mejiro family—Mejiro McQueen
and Mejiro Ryan in particular.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: These worries have driven her into despair.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove announces that she wishes to guide
her. She vows to show a worthy performance in
the Triple Tiara and become an ideal for Dober to
aspire toward.
